description: Quality Gate definitions for Harness Engineering. See spec §5.3.

ci_build.implementation: tsc --noEmit (or language-equivalent: cargo check, swift build, go build)

ci_test.implementation: yarn test | bun test | cargo test | swift test

ai_code_review.description: Claude Code GitHub Action posts review comment on PR.

spec_ratification.description: docs/plan/<change>/spec.md status is Ratified — PM/Designer/Engineer owners all approved.
spec_ratification.implementation: spec.md frontmatter status field; checked by AI before implement stage

test_plan_present.description: PR description contains a 'Test plan' section (PR rule 2).
test_plan_present.implementation: AI checks PR body before submitting for review

ac_coverage.description: Every AC in spec.md is covered by at least one task in tasks.md.
ac_coverage.implementation: AI cross-references spec.md AC list with tasks.md content before PR creation
